label: 第234話
source_locator: 単行本26巻 目次 p.127
summary_short: 乙骨たちは五条への加勢を議論するが、五条の戦いを妨げる危険から踏みとどまる。五条は顎吐を破壊し、遠隔で虚式「茈」を成立させる準備を始める。
summary_full: 乙骨たちは五条への加勢を議論するが、五条の戦いを妨げる危険から踏みとどまる。五条は顎吐を破壊し、遠隔で虚式「茈」を成立させる準備を始める。乙骨は参戦を望むが、五条が単独で全力を出せることを優先して止められる。魔虚羅は遠距離斬撃で五条の右腕を落とすが、五条は顎吐を蒼で圧壊する。

candidate_evidence.summary_short_legacy: 五条悟 's allies discuss and disagree on aiding him in the battle. Despite continuing to lose ground against 宿儺 and his two 式神, 五条 still has an ace up his sleeve, the Unlimited Hollow of the 無下限呪術 !
candidate_evidence.summary_full_legacy: 憂太 decides to help his sensei and gets up to leave for the battlefield. With an aura of electricity surrounding him, 鹿紫雲一 demands 憂太 sit back down. He tells 憂太 he has no right to interfere and adds he's not even next in line to fight. 憂太 responds by flaring up his 呪力 but 秤 tells him to chill out, siding with 鹿紫雲. "This is 五条悟's battle. Whatever happens, it wouldn't be right for anyone to intervene." 秤 reminds 憂太 that 五条 ordered them to stay out of the fight unless he's weakened to the point that either of them could take him. 憂太 argues this is an extenuating circumstance because 宿儺 can't expand his domain . 憂太 believes that he and 里香 could relieve pressure on 五条 by dealing with the two 式神 . 真希 interjects and says that she should be the one to go out, further irritating 鹿紫雲. She reminds 憂太 he has a crucial role to play and their insurance goes down with him. 憂太 believes they won't need insurance should they take this gamble and take down 宿儺 now. 悠仁 agrees with 憂太 but 日下部 takes control of the conversation and re-emphasizes the overall goals of their group. 冥冥 explains that the win conditions for 五条 and 宿儺 are very different. 五条 only needs to defeat 宿儺 because his allies can probably defeat 羂索 if they all work together. Even if 宿儺 defeats 五条, he will have to face all of the jujutsu sorcerers immediately after. 秤 believes that 宿儺 is holding back an ace up his sleeve and provoking him would be unwise. 日下部 agrees and adds that 裏梅 is still lying in wait as well. 五条 can go all out unhindered while 宿儺 still has to hold back, maximizing the chances of victory for the jujutsu sorcerers. 憂太 sulks over being considered a burden to 五条 and 鹿紫雲 asks if all modern-day sorcerers are morons. 鹿紫雲 emphasizes that this is 五条悟's battle and it would simply be wrong for anyone else to interfere. 五条 prioritizes taking out 嵌合獣 顎吐 顎吐. 五条 is on the defensive while 魔虚羅 and 顎吐 pursue him. He ducks under a grab attempt from 顎吐 and destroys its abdomen with 黒閃 . 顎吐 quickly heals and attacks with 大蛇 as its tail. 五条 avoids the bite from 大蛇 and rips its head off 顎吐's tail. He knows all of the 式神 顎吐 is comprised of but focuses on 円鹿 . Its regenerative powers make it so 顎吐 must be destroyed in one blow, the same win condition as 魔虚羅 without having to adapt. 魔虚羅 adapts to 五条 again. While 魔虚羅 attacks and is just as quickly repelled, 顎吐 tries to electrocute 五条 from behind. The 無限 stops 顎吐's attack and 五条 responds with a powerful right hook while calling out the 式神 for repeating the same moves. He doesn't want 顎吐 to heal 宿儺 and is prioritizing destroying it for now. 宿儺's main concern is 虚式「茈」 and one hundred percent output could prove fatal. Unimpressed with 魔虚羅's performance thus far, 宿儺 believes the 式神 needs reminding that it is his shadow and not 恵's anymore. 宿儺 wants 魔虚羅 to display its full power and the wheel atop its head spins at that moment. Suddenly, 五条's right arm is cut completely off by a flying slash attack from 魔虚羅's blade. 宿儺 expresses his content while 悠仁 and 日下部 are surprised that 魔虚羅's attack hit from long range. 硝子 worries that 五条 won't be able to heal efficiently. The two 式神 attack in unison as 宿儺 emerges from his shadow and barrages 五条 as well. 魔虚羅 knocks 五条 back and 宿儺 capitalizes with a head kick that sends him reeling toward 顎吐. However, 五条 restores the 無限 before he's hit by 顎吐 and halts the enemy's momentum. He turns to face the 式神 and tells 顎吐 it can't keep pace with this fight. The battle of the strongest approaches its climax! 五条 creates a sphere of Blue around his remaining fist and punches it into 顎吐's gut. He uses Blue at maximum output to collapse 顎吐 into itself before sending the field of attraction at 宿儺. 魔虚羅 moves 宿儺 out of the way as Blue tears through the city and destroys 顎吐. 五条 begins regenerating his arm as the fierce battle heads towards its climax. In another forty-one seconds, 虚式「茈」 will once again carve its way through 魔境 新宿.

candidate_evidence.locations_raw_text: 東京 新宿 新宿

key_events_verified_phase11: 乙骨たちは五条への加勢を議論するが、五条の戦いを妨げる危険から踏みとどまる。
五条は顎吐を破壊し、遠隔で虚式「茈」を成立させる準備を始める。
乙骨は参戦を望むが、五条が単独で全力を出せることを優先して止められる。
魔虚羅は遠距離斬撃で五条の右腕を落とすが、五条は顎吐を蒼で圧壊する。
verification_notes_phase11: 集英社公式24～30巻目次・巻概要、日本語の原作漫画巻別資料、旧候補資料を話単位で突合した最終区間。単行本各ページの直接最終照合前。
